query:
-- Drop old contracts table and recreate with full schema
ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorEmail varchar(320),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorRole varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectLocation varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalFee varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS deposit varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS finalPayment varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkinDate varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkoutDate varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS airbnbAddress text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventCity varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorSignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companySignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ndaSignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pdfData text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS w9FormId int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceCertificateUrl text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceCertificateFileName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceUploadedAt timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS token varchar(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentAt timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS signedAt timestamp NULL;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user D3ADtLHzpWqDkQ8.6577a1716d46 --database hZhvBDwnUYPXmoN2sbiKGJ --execute 
-- Drop old contracts table and recreate with full schema
ALTER TABLE contracts 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorEmail varchar(320),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorRole varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS projectLocation varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS totalFee varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS deposit varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS finalPayment varchar(20),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS paymentMethod varchar(100),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkinDate varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS checkoutDate varchar(50),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS airbnbAddress text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS eventCity varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS equipment text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS contractorSignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companySignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ndaSignature text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS pdfData text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS w9FormId int,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceCertificateUrl text,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceCertificateFileName varchar(255),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS insuranceUploadedAt timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS token varchar(64),
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS sentAt timestamp NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS signedAt timestamp NULL;
